items.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Jumps On Shutdown Hopes; This Stock Gets Support (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index was up on the stock market today as government shutdown hopes rose. Bitcoin rallied while Nvidia and Palantir stock jumped.

items.title: Wall Street Lunch: Generative AI Powers October E-Commerce Spending
items.description: Adobe (ADBE) says U.S. online spending rose 8.2% year-over-year in October to $88.7 billion.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises On Shutdown Deal Hopes; Nvidia, Palantir, Tesla Rally (Live Coverage)
items.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rose after a deal to end the government shutdown passed a key vote late Sunday, Nvidia rallied.

items.title: Insurers Slide As Congress Postpones Decision On Health Subsidies, Delays Obamacare Subsidy Vote To December
items.description: Health insurer stocks fell after the Senate ended the shutdown without extending ACA subsidies, delaying the decision to December and raising premium concerns.

items.title: Here’s What Happened to UnitedHealth (UNH)
items.description: Pelican Bay Capital Management, an investment management company, released its third-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the same can be downloaded here. PBCM Concentrated Value Strategy returned 7.8% in the quarter, compared to a 5.3% return for the Russell 1000 Value Index. YTD, the fund returned 11.2% compared to 11.6% for the index. In addition, […]
